summary: Tested P0-4 (Payment Recording) and P0-5 (User Registration) bug fixes. All 13 tests passed. Both critical bugs are confirmed fixed.

minor.issue: Requires trailing slash - GET /api/v1/payments-received/ works, but /api/v1/payments-received returns 405

critical_code_review_comments: P0-4 Fix Verified: payments_received.py correctly queries 'contacts' and 'invoices' collections (not contacts_enhanced/invoices_enhanced)
P0-4 Fix Verified: Payment recording includes organization_id field and filters by org_id for multi-tenant isolation
P0-5 Fix Verified: Registration creates all 4 documents (user, organization, organization_users, subscription)
P0-5 Fix Verified: JWT token contains org_id claim
P0-5 Fix Verified: Subscription created with plan_code=starter, status=trialing
seed_data_creation: Demo org membership created for demo@voltmotors.in. Invoice balances reset fixture ensures idempotent tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0-4 and P0-5 bugs are fixed. Test file includes cleanup fixture that removes test users/payments after each run. Invoice balances are reset before payment tests to ensure idempotency.

P0_4_Payment_Recording.test_record_payment_success_customer_fou: PASSED - Customer found from contacts collection, payment includes org_id
P0_4_Payment_Recording.test_record_payment_wrong_org_customer_4: PASSED - Returns 404 for customer in different org (multi-tenant isolation)
P0_4_Payment_Recording.test_list_payments_filtered_by_org: PASSED - Lists only payments for JWT's org_id
P0_4_Payment_Recording.test_record_retainer_payment: PASSED - Retainer payment creates customer credit

P0_5_User_Registration.test_register_creates_all_documents: PASSED - Creates user, organization, membership, subscription
P0_5_User_Registration.test_register_auto_generates_org_name: PASSED - Auto-generates 'User's Workshop' if org_name not provided
P0_5_User_Registration.test_new_user_can_login_and_access_modul: PASSED - New user can access tickets, contacts-enhanced, items-enhanced
